title: Big Ideas 2026: Infrastructure and security
body: Source: Big Ideas 2026 report
Focus: Infrastructure transformation and security evolution

title: Agenda
body: Enterprise data challenges: unstructured multimodal data management
Cybersecurity workforce crisis and AI automation solutions
Agent-native infrastructure for recursive workloads
Video generation evolution: from passive to interactive
Healthcare's underserved segment: healthy MAUs
Education transformation: AI-native universities

title: Enterprise Data Challenge
body: Enterprises are drowning in unstructured multimodal data
Data types include PDFs, screenshots, and videos
Continuous cleaning and structuring required

title: Cybersecurity Hiring Crisis: Historical Growth
body: Unfilled cybersecurity positions were under 1 million in 2013
Unfilled positions grew to 3 million by 2021
Persistent hiring challenges face the cybersecurity sector

title: AI Automation Solution for Cybersecurity
body: AI automation promises to resolve the hiring crisis
Solution eliminates repetitive log review tasks
Addresses the gap created by 3 million unfilled positions

title: Agent-Native Infrastructure Necessity
body: Agent-native infrastructure becomes essential
Recursive, bursty workloads replace predictable human-speed traffic
New infrastructure requirements driven by agentic behavior patterns

title: Recursive Workload Scale
body: A single agentic goal can trigger recursive fan-out
Fan-out generates 5,000 sub-tasks
Task generation occurs in milliseconds

title: Infrastructure Shift: From Human-Speed to Agent-Speed
body: Traditional infrastructure designed for predictable human-speed traffic
Agent workloads are recursive and bursty
Millisecond-scale task generation requires new architectural approaches

title: Video Generation Evolution
body: Video generation shifts from passive consumption model
Transformation toward interactive environments
User engagement paradigm fundamentally changes

title: Healthcare's Underserved Segment
body: Healthy MAUs identified as underserved segment
MAUs are preventatively-oriented consumers
Healthcare opportunity in prevention rather than treatment

title: AI-Native University: Real-Time Adaptation
body: The first AI-native university will emerge
Courses will adapt in real time
Advising and assessment will adapt in real time

title: Outlook: Convergence of Infrastructure and Intelligence
body: Infrastructure must evolve to support agent-scale workloads
AI automation addresses critical workforce gaps in cybersecurity
Real-time adaptation becomes standard across education and healthcare
